pi_items.source: setup_task.sh tiddler creation and verifier.py regex checks
setup_task.sh tiddler creation fields and verifier.py transclusion checks

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a TiddlyWiki ViewTemplate. The target system tag is '$:/tags/ViewTemplate', which ensures it is applied to the UI correctly. The custom template must conditionally render only for tiddlers with the 'Paper' tag. The template must transclude four specific custom fields: 'author', 'journal', 'year', and 'doi'. All these fields and the 'Paper' tag are confirmed to be present in the synthetically generated seed tiddlers (Attention Is All You Need, MapReduce, and ResNet) created by the setup script.
